notes.engine: TTS engine to use. Options: 'pyttsx3' (offline). Future: 'elevenlabs', 'gtts'.
notes.rate: Speech speed in words per minute. Default is 185.
notes.voice_index: Index of the voice to use (0 = first system voice). Run list_voices.py to see options.

responses.waiting_for_command: What can I do for you?
responses.command_not_found: That command doesn't exist. Please give a new command, or say cancel to go back.
responses.command_failed: Something went wrong while running that command.

notes.energy_threshold: 250 = sensitive enough to catch clear speech without false triggers. Lower if still missing you.
notes.pause_threshold: 1.0s — waits a full second of silence before cutting off. Reduces mid-sentence cutoffs.
notes.timeout: 10s to wait for speech to begin.
notes.ambient_duration: 0.8s calibration — more accurate noise floor reading.
notes.retry_on_unknown: Retry once if heard but not understood.
notes.show_all: Use highest-confidence result from all Google candidates instead of first guess.
notes.language: BCP-47 code. en-US for American English.
